Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental

Class TxnSupplementalLineBase

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental.TxnSupplementalLineBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeferredRevenueLine, OtherAssetsLine, OtherLiabilitiesLine, PayablesLine, PrepaidExpenseLine, ReceivablesLine
public abstract class TxnSupplementalLineBase extends Object implements Serializable
